calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Off Calendar

Minors' Compromise (3) In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Trina Ayala.
Richard P. Hill, Esq., for Petitioner: Juanita Rangel, present as Guardian at litem for Nicolette Ramirez, Alana Castro and Noelle Ramirez, minors and Claimant. Also present Michelle Ramirez, mother, were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petitions are granted and compromise is approved as to each of the minors, Nicolette Ramirez, Alana Castro and Noelle Ramirez as follows:
Attorney Fees: $4,001.84
Medical Expenses $373.32
Fees & Expenses: $4,375.16
A net balance of $20,624.84, to be deposited into a blocked accounts with Bank of America, Branch #686, San Francisco Produce Branch, 2090 Jerrold Avenue, San Francisco, CA 94124. No withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-20-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Set For Trial On Oct-11-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Sep-22-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220
